premarket_brief:
# PRE-MARKET GAME PLAN | 2026-06-03

**Market Tone:** Flat open with neutral breadth (50%) and elevated VIX (20.0) suggests cautious positioning ahead of NFP in 2 days. Expect low conviction moves; bull regime intact but no directional bias yet.

**Positions to Watch:** Monitor AXON, AAVEUSD, STX for gap reversals given tech sector flatness. Exit 25% on any +2% gap-up spikes into resistance; hold core if flat-to-down.

**Top Entry:** DE (Deere) at 120 break with volume confirmation—agricultural strength should persist into earnings season.

**
